summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Super Admin portal with subscription/invoice management. All 26 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all 3 tabs (Overview, Companies, Invoices) working correctly. Super Admin login, company subscription management (activate/deactivate/free), invoice generation, and payment registration all functional. Existing multi-tenant features (company login, kiosk flow, admin dashboard) continue to work. Dutch UI throughout.
passed_tests: Super Admin login at /superadmin/login with email=admin@facturatie.sr password=Bharat7755
Super Admin dashboard overview tab: shows stats (9 total companies, 4 active, 1 trial, 1 free, 0 expired, 3 deactivated)
Super Admin overview: shows revenue SRD 7,000.00, 2 pending invoices
Super Admin overview: shows bank details (Hakrinbank, 205911044, 5978934982)
Super Admin companies tab: shows all 9 companies with subscription status badges
Super Admin companies tab: action buttons (Activeren, Deactiveren, Gratis abonnement, Factuur genereren)
Super Admin invoices tab: shows 4 invoices with FAC-2026-XXXX format
Super Admin invoices tab: shows amount SRD 3.500,00, bank details, payment registration button
Super Admin: Generate invoice for company (POST /api/superadmin/invoices/generate/{company_id})
Super Admin: Register payment dialog shows invoice details, amount input, confirm button
Super Admin: Register payment on invoice activates company subscription for 30 days
Super Admin: Grant free subscription to company (no expiry)
Super Admin: Deactivate company → company admin and kiosk blocked (403)
Company registration includes trial period (3 days) with subscription_status=trial
Company with deactivated subscription cannot access admin dashboard (403)
Company with deactivated subscription cannot access kiosk routes (403)
Existing multi-tenant features: company login works (demo@vastgoed.sr / demo123)
Existing multi-tenant features: kiosk flow works (/kiosk/comp_demo)
Existing multi-tenant features: admin dashboard works with stats
Landing page at / is SaaS page (not company listing)
Kiosk payment flow with balance update: partial rent payment decreases outstanding_rent
Dutch interface throughout all screens (Super Admin, Company Admin, Kiosk)
seed_data_creation: Test companies created during pytest run with TEST_ prefix for subscription management tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Super Admin portal fully functional. Subscription model: trial(3d) → expired(3d grace) → deactivated. Super admin can activate(30d), deactivate, or grant free(no expiry). Invoices: SRD 3500/month, Hakrinbank account 205911044. comp_demo has active subscription. Test companies created with TEST_ prefix during testing.
